post.body:
I didnt even get into the limelight... I queued for quite a while, cos i had nothing better to do, I got to the very  front, then was told they were closed and werent lettin anyone else in. Sucks. 

But in a way im glad - didnt really wanna go out tonight anyway.

comments.body:
that sucks seriously.

I hate when that happens
It happened to some of my friends a few weeks ago and they were pissed off.
I meant to ask you did you go to Starsailor.
Snow Patrol DJ is on in the Stiff Kitten on Dec 29th, sounds tempting.

Happy Christmas (in case I don't get to speak to u before it)
How is the challenge coming?

Chris
comments.author: chrissyk_lotn
